title: juncus × fulvescens
intro: Juncus × fulvescens, also known as alpine rush or green alpine rush, is a hybrid plant species within the Juncaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of flavonoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Juncus × fulvescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by infusing its leaves and stems in hot water to create a herbal tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
